html:
Exclusive to:  

GenericMined

Glommer's Statue is a unique structure that appears in the Reign of Giants DLC. It spawns in the Deciduous Forest Biome. When mined, it drops three Marble and the Old Bell Blueprint. Mining the statue does not completely destroy it.

On a full moon, a Glommer's Flower will spawn at the base of Glommer's Statue (even if it has been mined). Picking up Glommer's Flower will trigger Glommer to become a permanent "follower" (until Glommer dies). After mining the statue, the base will remain, allowing Glommer and Glommer's Flower to respawn at a full moon. The statue has a 75% chance to spawn near a Pan Flute.

Glommer's Flower can only be picked once per full moon, on either night. If a player picks it on the first night of the full moon, and then Glommer dies before the following night, they cannot pick it again the second night - they must wait until the next full moon. If a player picked the flower the previous full moon and Glommer dies on either day, the flower can still be picked that night.

There seems to be a high chance that Glommer's Statue will spawn next to a Pig King village, which might make collecting Glommer's Flower difficult due to Werepigs.

Bugs

  • Sometimes the statue will not spawn. This can be the result of an error in the world generation.
  • If the statue is destroyed by any other means than mining (e.g. a Clockwork Rook), the blueprint may not drop.

Gallery

  • Glommer's Statue after being mined.
  • Glommer's Statue after being mined.
  • Glommer's Statue as it is found next to a Pan Flute and two Birchnut Tree stumps.
  • Glommer's Statue during a Full Moon with Glommer and its flower present.
  • Glommer and the flower spawn even if the Statue has been mined.
  • Glommer's Statue as it appears on the Map.
  • An example of bad world generation in which Glommer's Statue did not spawn.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

GenericMined
“I'm not sure what that's supposed to be.”
–Wilson
“Is that supposed to be something?”
–Willow
“Why statue is not flying?”
–Wolfgang
“What IS that?!”
–Wendy
“STONE INSECT”
–WX-78
“Is it petrified?”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a curious statue, eh?”
–Woodie
“Hey, that's not a statue of me!”
–Maxwell
“Something in the stone must cultivate the flower.”
–Wagstaff
“A curiöus hömage tö the göds.”
–Wigfrid
“A statue of some weird bug.”
–Webber
“All messed up now.”
–Walani
“Must have been a pretty important, uh, thingy...”
–Warly
“Ugly statue.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS MOCKING DEATH”
–Wilba
“That you, nice friend?”
–Wormwood
“Swell. A big bug statue.”
–Wheeler
“I broke it. For science.”
–Wilson, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Looks about the same.”
–Willow, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Smash!”
–Wolfgang, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“I killed it.”
–Wendy, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“SMASHED STONE INSECT”
–WX-78, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Nope, just a statue.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“It had some cool things inside, eh?”
–Woodie, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“That'll teach it to not be me.”
–Maxwell, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“How strange! It's composed of just regular marble.”
–Wagstaff, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“That wasn't very respectful öf me.”
–Wigfrid, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Take that, rock bug!”
–Webber, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Woah, far out.”
–Walani, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Oops.”
–Warly, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“It broke up.”
–Woodlegs, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“'TIS DEAD”
–Wilba, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“Gone”
–Wormwood, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
“It's my policy to always break things open and see what's inside.”
–Wheeler, examining a mined Glommer's Statue.
Glommer's Statue is a unique structure that appears in the Reign of Giants DLC. It spawns in the Deciduous Forest Biome. When mined, it drops three Marble and the Old Bell Blueprint. Mining the statue does not completely destroy it.
On a full moon, a Glommer's Flower will spawn at the base of Glommer's Statue (even if it has been mined). Picking up Glommer's Flower will trigger Glommer to become a permanent "follower" (until Glommer dies). After mining the statue, the base will remain, allowing Glommer and Glommer's Flower to respawn at a full moon. The statue has a 75% chance to spawn near a Pan Flute.
Glommer's Flower can only be picked once per full moon, on either night. If a player picks it on the first night of the full moon, and then Glommer dies before the following night, they cannot pick it again the second night - they must wait until the next full moon. If a player picked the flower the previous full moon and Glommer dies on either day, the flower can still be picked that night.
There seems to be a high chance that Glommer's Statue will spawn next to a Pig King village, which might make collecting Glommer's Flower difficult due to Werepigs.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Sometimes the statue will not spawn. This can be the result of an error in the world generation.
If the statue is destroyed by any other means than mining (e.g. a Clockwork Rook), the blueprint may not drop.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tượng Glommer là một công trình kiến ​​trúc độc đáo xuất hiện trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants. Nó sinh sản trong Quần xã Rừng Rụng Lá. Khi khai thác, nó rơi ra ba viên Cẩm Thạch và Bản thiết kế Chuông Cũ. Khai thác bức tượng không phá hủy hoàn toàn nó.
